description: Olimex ESP32-POE-ISO with ESP32-WROOM, Ethernet with galvanically isolated Power over Ethernet (802.3af), and microSD slot. No separate power supply needed.

featured_components.description: Built-in Ethernet PHY with isolated PoE — wired networking with no Wi-Fi setup.
featured_components.name: Onboard Ethernet

name: OLIMEX ESP32-PoE-ISO

pins.label: GPIO0
pins.notes: ADC2_CH1, Touch1 — strapping pin (boot mode select)

pins.label: GPIO1
pins.notes: Default UART0 TX

pins.label: GPIO2
pins.notes: ADC2_CH2, Touch2 — strapping pin (must be low/floating for flash boot)

pins.notes: Default UART0 RX

pins.notes: ADC2_CH0, Touch0

pins.notes: Default VSPI CS — strapping pin (outputs PWM at boot)

pins.notes: SPI Flash CLK — do not use

pins.notes: SPI Flash SD2 — do not use

pins.notes: SPI Flash SD3 — do not use

pins.notes: SPI Flash CMD — do not use

pins.notes: ADC2_CH4, Touch4

pins.notes: ADC2_CH6, Touch6
